query:
INSERT INTO core.runs (
                manifest_id,
                service_name,
                instance_id,
                host,
                status,
                last_heartbeat_at,
                effective_config_hash,
                effective_config
            ) VALUES (
                $1,
                $2,
                $3,
                $4,
                'running',
                NOW(),
                $5,
                $6
            )
            RETURNING
                id as "id!: Id<ModuleRun>",
                manifest_id,
                service_name,
                instance_id,
                host,
                started_at as "started_at!: sinex_primitives::temporal::Timestamp",
                ended_at as "ended_at: sinex_primitives::temporal::Timestamp",
                status,
                last_heartbeat_at as "last_heartbeat_at: sinex_primitives::temporal::Timestamp",
                effective_config_hash,
                effective_config
